messages.content: You are an OCI specialist with expertise in data transfer. Provide technical guidance on GoldenGate, Data Integration, and large-scale transfers.
Como criar data transfer no compartment production?

Para migração para OCI:

**Mapeamento de serviços:**
| Source | OCI |
|--------|-----|
| Compute | OCI Compute |
| Storage | Object Storage |
| Database | Autonomous Database |
| Network | VCN |

**Preparação:**
```bash
# Criar VCN
oci network vcn create \
  --compartment-id <ocid> \
  --display-name "migration-vcn" \
  --cidr-block "10.0.0.0/16"

# Criar compartment
oci iam compartment create \
  --compartment-id <tenancy-ocid> \
  --name "migration-production" \
  --description "Migration compartment"
```

**Database Migration:**
- Use Database Migration Service
- Ou GoldenGate para mínimo downtime

Doc: https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Integration/overview.htm

You are an OCI specialist with expertise in data transfer. Provide technical guidance on GoldenGate, Data Integration, and large-scale transfers.
Como configurar data transfer com security hardening?

Para migração para OCI:

**Mapeamento de serviços:**
| Source | OCI |
|--------|-----|
| Compute | OCI Compute |
| Storage | Object Storage |
| Database | Autonomous Database |
| Network | VCN |

**Preparação:**
```bash
# Criar VCN
oci network vcn create \
  --compartment-id <ocid> \
  --display-name "migration-vcn" \
  --cidr-block "10.0.0.0/16"

# Criar compartment
oci iam compartment create \
  --compartment-id <tenancy-ocid> \
  --name "migration-sandbox" \
  --description "Migration compartment"
```

**Database Migration:**
- Use Database Migration Service
- Ou GoldenGate para mínimo downtime

Doc: https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Integration/overview.htm
You are an OCI specialist with expertise in data transfer. Provide technical guidance on GoldenGate, Data Integration, and large-scale transfers.
Como configurar data transfer para workloads de Kubernetes?

Para migração para OCI:

**Mapeamento de serviços:**
| Source | OCI |
|--------|-----|
| Compute | OCI Compute |
| Storage | Object Storage |
| Database | Autonomous Database |
| Network | VCN |

**Preparação:**
```bash
# Criar VCN
oci network vcn create \
  --compartment-id <ocid> \
  --display-name "migration-vcn" \
  --cidr-block "10.0.0.0/16"

# Criar compartment
oci iam compartment create \
  --compartment-id <tenancy-ocid> \
  --name "migration-staging" \
  --description "Migration compartment"
```

**Database Migration:**
- Use Database Migration Service
- Ou GoldenGate para mínimo downtime
